Python Path.__desc: Path to the Python executable to use for running bots and the game engine.

Bots Directory.__desc: Directory to search in when looking for bots.

Maps Directory.__desc: Directory to search in when looking for maps. Attempts to parse all json files.

Reload Default Maps on Startup.__desc: Whether default maps should always be re-populated upon app startup, even if you've deleted them before. This does NOT overwrite any edits made to default maps, only restores deleted ones.
